---
title: "R Bites"
author: "By Gabriel Broussard Korr"
language:
  title-block-author-single: ""
---

---

This is where I upload articles on small projects I've done. At first it was just for R, but I started branching out!

See my [Github](https://github.com/gbkorr) for more projects!

#### *Recent Articles*:

*April*

<img class='thumbnail' src=images/temperature.png>

A **tiny full-stack Python pipeline** that retrieves satellite data to estimate your local temperature. [link](temperature/temperature.qmd) 

<br clear="left">

*March*

<img class='thumbnail' src=images/selfie.png>

A **video conference client** running in R, streaming webcam video to the console. [link](conference/conference.qmd)

<br clear="left">

<img class='thumbnail' src=images/flipphone.jpeg> 

Running **R on a flip phone**, and pushing to github from it. [link](flipphone-r/flipphone-r.qmd)

<br clear="left">

*February*

<img class='thumbnail' src=images/video-player.gif>

A lightweight set of functions to **render video in the console** at native framerate. [link](video-player/video-player.qmd)

<br clear="left"/>
